name: Nauratan (Nine Jewels Meat with Vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash all the vegetables and cut into 1-inch pieces.
2. Fry all the vegetables with half of the oil until light brown, then set aside.
3. Heat the remaining oil in a large saucepan. Add sliced onions and fry until light brown.
4. Add salt and spices to the onions and fry for a few minutes.
5. Wash the cubed lamb and add it to the onions. Fry until light brown. Add 1 cup of hot water and cook over slow fire until the meat is tender.
6. When the meat is tender and only a little water remains, add all the vegetables.
7. Mix the vegetables and meat together and cook over a slow fire, stirring gently to avoid mashing the vegetables, for about 5 minutes.
8. Transfer to a medium oven for 5-10 minutes, until the oil separates.
